nodes.label: ShipShape Ledger
nodes.rationale: A financial application for tracking cash, bank, and stock transactions for Ha-Mim Iron Mart.

nodes.label: Ha-Mim Iron Mart Brand Identity
nodes.rationale: Visual identity featuring a ship with red containers and blue silhouette, emphasizing stability and iron mart theme.

nodes.label: Authentication Middleware
nodes.rationale: Handles redirection based on session presence to protect application routes.
